title: telis graeca
intro: Telis graeca, also known as Thelycradis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Telis graeca include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Telis graeca typically involve drying and processing the leaves, stems, or roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams for therapeutic use.
